title: Hollowing Demise
description: Dead players become spirits with healing mechanics inspired by Hollow Knight.
body:
# Hollowing Demise

Hollowing Demise adds a new twist to dying: When a player dies, they become a hollow: a spirit that has an essence meter instead of a hunger bar. Essence is gathered by collecting experience and can be spent to recover health similarly to _Hollow Knight_. Default keybind is [R].

![A field of monsters from the perspective of a weakened spirit about to die. Shows a blue health bar and an essence meter in place of food.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8VL2CF0/images/db1517f94787e4a76c6290f5c38303171bdd07b1_350.webp) ![The perspective of a spirit recovering lost health using gathered essence.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8VL2CF0/images/1ec55dc7ff5c9dbc648cd26ff57b9fe5fef8f068_350.webp)

Hollows can also spend essence to become ghosts, which allows them to evade danger. When a hollow is not in ghost form, it burns in daylight. Default keybind is [G].

![An intangible spirit flying near unaware monsters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8VL2CF0/images/58ccde20eea0c0bbe5e324c330848cd65daf9b4e_350.webp)

To return to life, look for almarite: a new ore used to make the totem of restoration.

![Blue, desaturated crystals poking out from deep stone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8VL2CF0/images/45b617669415bb035d4f0b21eca752ffc84f408d_350.webp) ![The template for creating a golden effigy.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q8VL2CF0/images/38c183b389d565e2f5394c5cc7421e5d1e32a6e9.png)
